schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Jan Dhan Yojana (PMJDY)
schemes.description: National mission for financial inclusion to ensure access to financial services like banking, savings, deposit accounts, remittance, credit, insurance and pension.
schemes.benefits: Zero balance savings account, RuPay debit card, Rs 1 lakh accident insurance, Rs 30,000 life cover, overdraft facility up to Rs 10,000
schemes.eligibility: Any Indian citizen above 10 years of age without a bank account
schemes.target_group: Unbanked population, rural and urban poor
schemes.income_level: Below poverty line and low income

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana (PMJJBY)
schemes.description: Government-backed life insurance scheme offering renewable term life coverage of Rs 2 lakh at a very low premium.
schemes.benefits: Rs 2 lakh life insurance cover on death due to any reason, annual premium of Rs 436
schemes.eligibility: Age 18–50 years with savings bank account

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojana (PMSBY)
schemes.description: Accident insurance scheme providing coverage for accidental death and disability at a nominal premium.
schemes.benefits: Rs 2 lakh for accidental death/total disability, Rs 1 lakh for partial disability, annual premium Rs 20
schemes.eligibility: Age 18–70 years with savings bank account

schemes.name: Atal Pension Yojana (APY)
schemes.description: Government pension scheme targeted at workers in the unorganised sector to provide guaranteed pension after age 60.
schemes.benefits: Guaranteed monthly pension of Rs 1000–5000 after age 60, government co-contribution for eligible subscribers
schemes.eligibility: Indian citizens aged 18–40 years with savings bank account, not an income tax payer

schemes.name: National Pension System (NPS)
schemes.description: Voluntary long-term retirement savings scheme designed to enable systematic savings during working life.
schemes.benefits: Market-linked pension corpus, tax benefits under Section 80C and 80CCD, annuity on retirement
schemes.eligibility: Indian citizens aged 18–70 years

schemes.name: Public Provident Fund (PPF)
schemes.description: Long-term savings scheme backed by government with attractive interest rates and tax benefits.
schemes.benefits: Tax-free interest (~7.1% p.a.), EEE tax status, loan facility, 15-year maturity extendable in 5-year blocks
schemes.eligibility: Indian residents, one account per individual

schemes.name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana (SSY)
schemes.description: Small deposit savings scheme for the girl child to meet education and marriage expenses.
schemes.benefits: High interest rate (~8.2% p.a.), tax deduction under 80C, EEE tax status, maturity on age 21
schemes.eligibility: Girl child below 10 years of age, one account per girl child

schemes.name: Senior Citizens Savings Scheme (SCSS)
schemes.description: Government-backed savings scheme specifically for senior citizens offering high interest rates.
schemes.benefits: Interest rate ~8.2% p.a., quarterly interest payout, tax deduction under 80C, max deposit Rs 30 lakh
schemes.eligibility: Indian residents aged 60 years and above

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana (PMMY)
schemes.description: Scheme to provide loans up to Rs 10 lakh to non-corporate, non-farm small/micro enterprises.
schemes.benefits: Shishu (up to Rs 50k), Kishore (Rs 50k–5 lakh), Tarun (Rs 5–10 lakh) loans without collateral
schemes.eligibility: Small business owners, entrepreneurs, self-employed individuals

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana - Urban (PMAY-U)
schemes.description: Affordable housing scheme providing interest subsidy on home loans for urban poor and middle income groups.
schemes.benefits: Interest subsidy of 3–6.5% on home loans, Credit Linked Subsidy Scheme (CLSS)
schemes.eligibility: EWS, LIG, MIG categories without pucca house
schemes.target_group: Urban poor and middle income groups

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana - Gramin (PMAY-G)
schemes.description: Rural housing scheme providing financial assistance to BPL families for construction of pucca houses.
schemes.benefits: Rs 1.2 lakh (plain areas) or Rs 1.3 lakh (hilly/difficult areas) for house construction
schemes.eligibility: Rural households without pucca house, priority to SC/ST and BPL families

schemes.name: Ayushman Bharat Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana (AB-PMJAY)
schemes.description: World's largest government-funded health insurance scheme providing cashless treatment to poor families.
schemes.benefits: Health coverage of Rs 5 lakh per family per year for secondary and tertiary hospitalization
schemes.eligibility: Families identified as deprived as per SECC 2011 database

schemes.name: PM Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY)
schemes.description: Crop insurance scheme to provide financial support to farmers suffering crop loss due to natural calamities.
schemes.benefits: Insurance coverage for crop failure, low premium rates, quick claim settlement
schemes.eligibility: All farmers including sharecroppers and tenant farmers growing notified crops

schemes.name: Kisan Credit Card (KCC)
schemes.description: Credit scheme providing farmers with timely and adequate credit for agricultural needs.
schemes.benefits: Flexible revolving credit, interest subvention, accident insurance, simplified documentation
schemes.eligibility: All farmers, sharecroppers, tenant farmers

schemes.name: PM Kisan Samman Nidhi (PM-KISAN)
schemes.description: Income support scheme providing Rs 6000 per year to small and marginal farmers.
schemes.benefits: Rs 2000 direct cash transfer every 4 months, Rs 6000 annually
schemes.eligibility: Small and marginal farmers with cultivable landholding

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana (PMKVY)
schemes.description: Skill development scheme enabling youth to take up industry-relevant skill training.
schemes.benefits: Free skill training, monetary reward on successful completion, recognition of prior learning
schemes.eligibility: Indian nationals aged 15–45 years

schemes.name: Startup India
schemes.description: Government initiative to build a strong ecosystem for nurturing innovation and startups.
schemes.benefits: Tax exemption for 3 years, self-certification compliance, fast-track patent, Rs 10,000 crore fund
schemes.eligibility: DPIIT recognized startups up to 10 years old, turnover below Rs 100 crore

schemes.name: Stand Up India
schemes.description: Scheme to facilitate bank loans for SC/ST and women entrepreneurs to set up greenfield enterprises.
schemes.benefits: Loans between Rs 10 lakh and Rs 1 crore for setting up enterprises
schemes.eligibility: SC/ST borrowers and women entrepreneurs above 18 years

schemes.name: Beti Bachao Beti Padhao
schemes.description: Multi-sectoral government campaign addressing declining child sex ratio and promoting welfare of girl child.
schemes.benefits: Scholarships, improved girl enrollment in schools, awareness campaigns, support for girl education
schemes.eligibility: Girl children, especially in districts with low sex ratio

schemes.name: Mahila Shakti Kendra
schemes.description: Scheme to empower rural women through community participation and convergence of government schemes.
schemes.benefits: One-stop convergence support for women, skill development, digital literacy, government scheme linkage
schemes.eligibility: Rural women

schemes.name: National Savings Certificate (NSC)
schemes.description: Fixed income investment scheme by India Post for small to medium income investors.
schemes.benefits: Interest rate ~7.7% p.a., tax deduction under 80C, 5-year maturity, no TDS
schemes.eligibility: Indian residents, minimum investment Rs 1000

schemes.name: Kisan Vikas Patra (KVP)
schemes.description: Post office savings certificate scheme that doubles investment in a fixed period.
schemes.benefits: Investment doubles in ~115 months, no TDS, can be encashed after 2.5 years
schemes.eligibility: Indian residents above 18 years, minimum Rs 1000

schemes.name: Employees Provident Fund (EPF)
schemes.description: Mandatory retirement savings scheme for salaried employees in organized sector.
schemes.benefits: 8.15% interest p.a., employer contribution of 12%, tax-free corpus, insurance cover
schemes.eligibility: Employees earning up to Rs 15,000/month in establishments with 20+ employees

schemes.name: Employees State Insurance (ESI)
schemes.description: Self-financing social security and health insurance scheme for workers in organized sector.
schemes.benefits: Medical care, sickness benefit, maternity benefit, disablement benefit, dependent benefit
schemes.eligibility: Employees earning up to Rs 21,000/month in covered establishments

schemes.name: PM SVANidhi (Street Vendor AtmaNirbhar Nidhi)
schemes.description: Micro-credit scheme providing affordable working capital loans to street vendors.
schemes.benefits: Collateral-free loans of Rs 10,000–50,000, 7% interest subsidy, digital transaction rewards
schemes.eligibility: Street vendors with vending certificate/identity card

schemes.name: Aam Aadmi Bima Yojana (AABY)
schemes.description: Social security scheme providing life and disability insurance to rural landless households.
schemes.benefits: Rs 30,000 natural death cover, Rs 75,000 accidental death/total disability, scholarship for children
schemes.eligibility: Rural landless households, head of family aged 18–59 years

schemes.name: Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension Scheme (IGNOAPS)
schemes.description: Central government pension scheme for destitute elderly persons.
schemes.benefits: Rs 200–500 per month pension for BPL elderly
schemes.eligibility: BPL persons aged 60 years and above

schemes.name: PM Vaya Vandana Yojana (PMVVY)
schemes.description: Pension scheme for senior citizens providing assured return and regular pension income.
schemes.benefits: Assured return of 7.4% p.a., monthly/quarterly/half-yearly/annual pension, max Rs 15 lakh investment
schemes.eligibility: Indian residents aged 60 years and above

schemes.name: Rashtriya Swasthya Bima Yojana (RSBY)
schemes.description: Health insurance scheme for BPL families providing hospitalization coverage.
schemes.benefits: Rs 30,000 hospitalization cover per family per year, cashless treatment, smart card
schemes.eligibility: BPL families

schemes.name: Janani Suraksha Yojana (JSY)
schemes.description: Safe motherhood intervention scheme promoting institutional delivery among poor pregnant women.
schemes.benefits: Cash assistance of Rs 1400 (rural) and Rs 1000 (urban) for institutional delivery
schemes.eligibility: BPL pregnant women, SC/ST pregnant women

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Matru Vandana Yojana (PMMVY)
schemes.description: Maternity benefit scheme providing cash incentive to pregnant and lactating mothers.
schemes.benefits: Rs 5000 cash benefit in three installments for first live birth
schemes.eligibility: Pregnant and lactating women above 19 years for first child

schemes.name: Mid Day Meal Scheme
schemes.description: School feeding programme providing free lunch to school children across India.
schemes.benefits: Free cooked nutritious meal to school children, improved enrollment and attendance
schemes.eligibility: Students of Class 1–8 in government and government-aided schools

schemes.name: Sarva Shiksha Abhiyan (SSA)
schemes.description: Programme to achieve universalization of elementary education for children aged 6–14 years.
schemes.benefits: Free education, textbooks, uniforms, infrastructure development in schools
schemes.eligibility: Children aged 6–14 years

schemes.name: National Scholarship Portal (NSP)
schemes.description: One-stop portal for students to apply for various central government scholarships.
schemes.benefits: Merit and means-based scholarships for pre-matric, post-matric, and higher education
schemes.eligibility: Students from SC/ST/OBC/minority communities and meritorious students

schemes.name: Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act (MGNREGA)
schemes.description: Legal guarantee of 100 days of wage employment per year to rural households.
schemes.benefits: 100 days guaranteed wage employment, minimum wage, unemployment allowance if work not provided
schemes.eligibility: Rural households willing to do unskilled manual work

schemes.name: Deen Dayal Upadhyaya Grameen Kaushalya Yojana (DDU-GKY)
schemes.description: Skill training programme for rural youth to place them in regular salaried employment.
schemes.benefits: Free residential skill training, guaranteed placement, post-placement support
schemes.eligibility: Rural youth aged 15–35 years from poor families

schemes.name: Soil Health Card Scheme
schemes.description: Scheme providing soil health cards to farmers carrying crop-wise recommendations of nutrients.
schemes.benefits: Free soil testing, fertilizer recommendations, reduced input costs, improved crop yield
schemes.eligibility: All farmers

schemes.name: PM Krishi Sinchai Yojana (PMKSY)
schemes.description: Scheme to improve farm productivity and ensure better utilization of resources through irrigation.
schemes.benefits: Drip/sprinkler irrigation subsidy, watershed development, convergence of water initiatives
schemes.eligibility: Farmers with agricultural land

schemes.name: e-NAM (National Agriculture Market)
schemes.description: Pan-India electronic trading portal for agricultural commodities connecting mandis.
schemes.benefits: Online trading, better price discovery, transparent bidding, reduced transaction costs
schemes.eligibility: Farmers, traders, FPOs registered on platform

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Gram Sadak Yojana (PMGSY)
schemes.description: Rural road connectivity programme to connect all eligible unconnected habitations.
schemes.benefits: All-weather roads to rural areas, improved market access for farmers
schemes.eligibility: Unconnected rural habitations

schemes.name: Swachh Bharat Mission (SBM)
schemes.description: Nationwide campaign to eliminate open defecation and improve solid waste management.
schemes.benefits: Free toilet construction for BPL households, improved sanitation, cleaner environment
schemes.eligibility: BPL households without toilet

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana (PMUY)
schemes.description: Scheme to provide LPG connections to women from BPL households.
schemes.benefits: Free LPG connection with cylinder and stove, reduced indoor air pollution
schemes.eligibility: Women from BPL households without LPG connection

schemes.name: Saubhagya Scheme (PM Sahaj Bijli Har Ghar Yojana)
schemes.description: Scheme to provide electricity connections to all households in rural and urban areas.
schemes.benefits: Free electricity connection to BPL households, metered connection to others
schemes.eligibility: Households without electricity connection
schemes.target_group: Rural and urban households without power

schemes.name: Deen Dayal Antyodaya Yojana - National Urban Livelihoods Mission (DAY-NULM)
schemes.description: Programme to reduce poverty and vulnerability of urban poor by enabling them to access gainful employment.
schemes.benefits: Self-employment, skill training, shelters, social security linkages
schemes.eligibility: Urban poor and homeless

schemes.name: Integrated Child Development Services (ICDS)
schemes.description: Programme delivering package of services for children below 6 years and pregnant/lactating mothers.
schemes.benefits: Supplementary nutrition, immunization, health checkup, referral, pre-school education
schemes.eligibility: Children 0–6 years, pregnant and lactating women

schemes.name: National Social Assistance Programme (NSAP)
schemes.description: Central assistance to state social assistance programmes for old age, widows and disabled persons.
schemes.benefits: Monthly pension of Rs 200–500 for elderly, widows, disabled persons from BPL families
schemes.eligibility: BPL persons — elderly (60+), widows (40–79), disabled persons

schemes.name: PM Scholarship Scheme for Central Armed Police Forces
schemes.description: Scholarship for wards of CAPF, AR and RPF/RPSF personnel for professional degree courses.
schemes.benefits: Rs 2500–3000 per month scholarship for professional degree courses
schemes.eligibility: Wards of CAPF/AR/RPF personnel, minimum 60% marks in qualifying exam

schemes.name: National Health Mission (NHM)
schemes.description: Government programme to strengthen healthcare infrastructure and provide quality healthcare to rural population.
schemes.benefits: Free healthcare services at public facilities, ASHA workers, free drugs and diagnostics
schemes.eligibility: All citizens, focus on rural and vulnerable population

schemes.name: Deendayal Disabled Rehabilitation Scheme (DDRS)
schemes.description: Scheme providing grants to NGOs for rehabilitation of persons with disabilities.
schemes.benefits: Education, vocational training, rehabilitation services for disabled persons
schemes.eligibility: Persons with disabilities

schemes.name: PM Garib Kalyan Anna Yojana (PMGKAY)
schemes.description: Food security scheme providing free ration to poorest households.
schemes.benefits: 5 kg free foodgrain per person per month to NFSA beneficiaries
schemes.eligibility: NFSA beneficiaries — Antyodaya and PHH card holders

schemes.name: Atmanirbhar Bharat Rozgar Yojana (ABRY)
schemes.description: Scheme to incentivize employers to create new employment by subsidizing EPF contributions.
schemes.benefits: Government pays employee and employer EPF contributions for new hires
schemes.eligibility: New employees earning below Rs 15,000/month in EPFO-registered establishments

schemes.name: Gold Monetization Scheme (GMS)
schemes.description: Scheme to mobilize idle gold held by households and institutions into the economy.
schemes.benefits: Interest on idle gold, gold returned in gold or cash on redemption, safe storage
schemes.eligibility: Individuals, HUFs, trusts, mutual funds with minimum 30g gold

schemes.name: Sovereign Gold Bond (SGB)
schemes.description: Government securities denominated in grams of gold as alternative to physical gold.
schemes.benefits: 2.5% annual interest, no storage cost, capital gains tax exemption on maturity
schemes.eligibility: Resident individuals, HUFs, trusts, universities, minimum 1 gram

schemes.name: Equity Linked Savings Scheme (ELSS)
schemes.description: Tax-saving mutual fund scheme with a 3-year lock-in period investing primarily in equities.
schemes.benefits: Tax deduction up to Rs 1.5 lakh under 80C, potential for high returns, shortest lock-in among 80C options
schemes.eligibility: Individual investors and HUFs

schemes.name: RBI Floating Rate Savings Bonds
schemes.description: Government of India floating rate bonds offering interest linked to NSC interest rate.
schemes.benefits: Current rate 8.05% p.a., paid semi-annually, 7-year tenure, no market risk
schemes.eligibility: Resident individuals and HUFs

schemes.name: Post Office Monthly Income Scheme (POMIS)
schemes.description: Post office scheme providing fixed monthly income at guaranteed interest rate.
schemes.benefits: Monthly interest income at 7.4% p.a., max investment Rs 9 lakh (single) / Rs 15 lakh (joint)
schemes.eligibility: Indian residents, minimum Rs 1000 investment

schemes.name: Post Office Time Deposit (POTD)
schemes.description: Fixed deposit scheme by India Post with government-guaranteed returns.
schemes.benefits: Interest rates 6.9–7.5% p.a. for 1–5 year tenures, tax benefit on 5-year TD
schemes.eligibility: Indian residents, minimum Rs 1000

schemes.name: Post Office Recurring Deposit (PORD)
schemes.description: Monthly savings scheme by India Post with compounded interest.
schemes.benefits: 6.7% interest p.a. compounded quarterly, 5-year maturity, loan facility after 1 year
schemes.eligibility: Indian residents, minimum Rs 100/month

schemes.name: Post Office Savings Account
schemes.description: Basic savings account with India Post offering guaranteed interest.
schemes.benefits: 4% p.a. interest, tax exemption up to Rs 3500 under 80TTA, cheque facility
schemes.eligibility: Indian residents, minimum Rs 500 balance

schemes.name: NABARD Grameen Bhandar Yojana
schemes.description: Scheme providing subsidy for construction of rural godowns and warehouses.
schemes.benefits: Capital subsidy of 25–33% for warehouse construction in rural areas
schemes.eligibility: Individuals, companies, cooperatives for rural storage facility

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Rozgar Protsahan Yojana (PMRPY)
schemes.description: Scheme incentivizing employers to create new jobs by paying EPF contribution.
schemes.benefits: Government pays 8.33% EPS contribution for new employees earning up to Rs 15,000
schemes.eligibility: EPFO registered establishments hiring new employees

schemes.name: National Pension Scheme for Traders and Self-Employed
schemes.description: Voluntary and contributory pension scheme for small traders and self-employed.
schemes.benefits: Monthly pension of Rs 3000 after age 60, government co-contributes equal amount
schemes.eligibility: Self-employed persons aged 18–40 with GST turnover below Rs 1.5 crore

schemes.name: PM Shram Yogi Maandhan (PM-SYM)
schemes.description: Voluntary and contributory pension scheme for unorganised sector workers.
schemes.benefits: Rs 3000 monthly pension after age 60, equal government co-contribution
schemes.eligibility: Unorganised workers aged 18–40 earning up to Rs 15,000/month

schemes.name: Digi Locker
schemes.description: Digital platform for storage and sharing of documents and certificates issued by government.
schemes.benefits: Secure cloud storage for documents, legally valid digital documents, reduced paperwork
schemes.eligibility: All Indian citizens with Aadhaar

schemes.name: Bharat Interface for Money (BHIM)
schemes.description: UPI-based mobile payment app developed by NPCI for digital transactions.
schemes.benefits: Instant bank-to-bank transfers, no transaction charges, 24x7 availability
schemes.eligibility: All bank account holders with registered mobile number

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Garib Kalyan Yojana (PMGKY)
schemes.description: Scheme allowing declaration of unaccounted income with tax payment and penalty.
schemes.benefits: Compliance window for black money declaration, deposit in Pradhan Mantri Garib Kalyan Deposit Scheme
schemes.eligibility: Indian taxpayers with undisclosed income

schemes.name: Agriculture Infrastructure Fund (AIF)
schemes.description: Medium-long term financing facility for agriculture infrastructure post-harvest management.
schemes.benefits: Loans with 3% interest subvention, credit guarantee support for projects up to Rs 2 crore
schemes.eligibility: Farmers, FPOs, PACS, cooperatives, startups for agri-infrastructure

schemes.name: PM Formalization of Micro Food Processing Enterprises (PMFME)
schemes.description: Scheme to enhance competitiveness of existing micro food processing enterprises.
schemes.benefits: 35% capital subsidy up to Rs 10 lakh, credit linkage, brand development support
schemes.eligibility: Existing micro food processing units

schemes.name: Credit Guarantee Fund Trust for Micro and Small Enterprises (CGTMSE)
schemes.description: Credit guarantee scheme providing collateral-free loans to MSMEs.
schemes.benefits: Collateral-free loans up to Rs 2 crore with credit guarantee coverage
schemes.eligibility: Micro and small enterprises, new and existing

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri MUDRA Yojana - Tarun
schemes.description: Micro lending scheme providing Rs 5–10 lakh to established small businesses.
schemes.benefits: Loan Rs 5–10 lakh, no collateral, flexible repayment, working capital support
schemes.eligibility: Established micro/small businesses in non-agricultural sector

schemes.name: National SC-ST Hub
schemes.description: Initiative to provide professional support to SC/ST entrepreneurs to fulfill procurement norms.
schemes.benefits: Business advisory, marketing support, financial assistance, skill development
schemes.eligibility: SC/ST entrepreneurs and enterprises

schemes.name: Technology Development Board (TDB)
schemes.description: Financial support to technology entrepreneurs for commercialization of indigenous technology.
schemes.benefits: Equity participation, loans up to 50% of project cost for tech commercialization
schemes.eligibility: Indian companies with indigenous technology projects

schemes.name: PM Digital Health Mission (PMDHM)
schemes.description: Mission to develop health ID and digital health infrastructure for all citizens.
schemes.benefits: Unique health ID, digital health records, telemedicine access, health locker
schemes.eligibility: All Indian citizens

schemes.name: Jan Aushadhi Scheme (PMBJP)
schemes.description: Scheme providing quality generic medicines at affordable prices through dedicated stores.
schemes.benefits: Medicines at 50–90% discount vs market price at Pradhan Mantri Bhartiya Janaushadhi Kendras
schemes.eligibility: All citizens

schemes.name: National Apprenticeship Training Scheme (NATS)
schemes.description: Scheme providing on-the-job training to graduates and diploma holders in industries.
schemes.benefits: Monthly stipend, industry training, government contribution to stipend
schemes.eligibility: Graduates, diploma holders, ITI pass outs

schemes.name: Prime Minister's Employment Generation Programme (PMEGP)
schemes.description: Credit-linked subsidy programme for generating employment in non-farm sector.
schemes.benefits: 15–35% capital subsidy, loans up to Rs 50 lakh for manufacturing, Rs 20 lakh for service
schemes.eligibility: Indian citizens above 18 years, 8th pass for loans above Rs 10 lakh

schemes.name: Revised Model Tenancy Act
schemes.description: Framework to enable rental housing and balance interests of landlords and tenants.
schemes.benefits: Faster dispute resolution, transparent rental agreements, promotes rental housing market
schemes.eligibility: Landlords and tenants

schemes.name: RERA (Real Estate Regulatory Authority)
schemes.description: Regulatory body to protect home buyers' interests and boost investment in real estate.
schemes.benefits: Project registration, disclosure requirements, timely delivery, interest on delay
schemes.eligibility: Home buyers and real estate projects above 500 sq m or 8 apartments

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Bal Vikas Yojana
schemes.description: Comprehensive scheme for welfare and development of children.
schemes.benefits: Nutrition, education, healthcare and protection services for children
schemes.eligibility: Children below 6 years

schemes.name: e-Shram Portal
schemes.description: National database of unorganised workers providing them social security benefits.
schemes.benefits: Rs 2 lakh accidental insurance, social security scheme linkages, worker ID card
schemes.eligibility: Unorganised workers aged 16–59 not in EPF/NPS/ESIC

schemes.name: PM Poshan Abhiyaan (POSHAN 2.0)
schemes.description: Integrated nutrition support programme improving nutritional outcomes for children and women.
schemes.benefits: Supplementary nutrition, POSHAN tracker, community-based events, convergence
schemes.eligibility: Children 0–6 years, adolescent girls, pregnant and lactating women

schemes.name: Nai Roshni - Leadership Training for Minority Women
schemes.description: Scheme for leadership development of minority women at grass-root level.
schemes.benefits: Leadership training, awareness about government programmes, community development
schemes.eligibility: Minority community women aged 18–65 years

schemes.name: Rashtriya Mahila Kosh (RMK)
schemes.description: National Credit Fund for Women providing micro-credit to poor women for livelihood activities.
schemes.benefits: Micro credit at subsidized rates, no collateral, support for income generating activities
schemes.eligibility: Poor women particularly below poverty line

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Annadata Aay Sanrakshan Abhiyan (PM-AASHA)
schemes.description: Umbrella scheme to ensure MSP to farmers for their produce.
schemes.benefits: Price Support Scheme, Price Deficiency Payment Scheme, Private Procurement Stockist Scheme
schemes.eligibility: Farmers growing oilseeds, pulses, copra

schemes.name: Micro Units Development and Refinance Agency (MUDRA) - Shishu
schemes.description: Micro loan scheme for very small businesses and start-up units.
schemes.benefits: Loans up to Rs 50,000 without collateral for micro businesses
schemes.eligibility: Small business owners and micro enterprises

schemes.name: Jal Jeevan Mission
schemes.description: Mission to provide safe and adequate drinking water to every rural household by 2024.
schemes.benefits: Tap water connection in rural homes, assured quantity and quality water supply
schemes.eligibility: Rural households

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Gramin Digital Saksharta Abhiyan (PMGDISHA)
schemes.description: Scheme to make 6 crore rural households digitally literate across India.
schemes.benefits: Free digital literacy training, computer basics, internet usage, digital payment skills
schemes.eligibility: Rural household members (one per household) not digitally literate

schemes.name: Scheme for Trans Gender Persons
schemes.description: Comprehensive welfare scheme for transgender persons including healthcare, housing and education.
schemes.benefits: Skill development, healthcare, housing, certification, educational scholarships
schemes.eligibility: Transgender persons

schemes.name: Saansad Adarsh Gram Yojana (SAGY)
schemes.description: Scheme for MPs to develop model villages with social, cultural and other infrastructure.
schemes.benefits: Holistic village development, infrastructure, education, health and livelihood improvement
schemes.eligibility: Gram Panchayats adopted by MPs

schemes.name: PM Kisan Maan Dhan Yojana (PM-KMY)
schemes.description: Voluntary and contributory pension scheme for small and marginal farmers.
schemes.benefits: Rs 3000 monthly pension after age 60, government co-contribution equal to farmer's contribution
schemes.eligibility: Small and marginal farmers aged 18–40 with land up to 2 hectares

schemes.name: Atal Innovation Mission (AIM)
schemes.description: Government initiative to promote innovation and entrepreneurship across India.
schemes.benefits: Atal Tinkering Labs in schools, Atal Incubation Centres, funding for startups
schemes.eligibility: Schools, colleges, startups, entrepreneurs

schemes.name: PM Vishwakarma Yojana
schemes.description: Scheme to support artisans and craftspeople in traditional trades with financial and skill support.
schemes.benefits: Collateral-free loans Rs 1–3 lakh, skill training, toolkits, Rs 500/day training stipend, PM Vishwakarma certificate
schemes.eligibility: Artisans and craftspeople in 18 traditional trades

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana 2.0
schemes.description: Extended scheme to provide LPG connections to migrant and poor households.
schemes.benefits: Free LPG connection, first refill free, stove free, no documentation for migrants
schemes.eligibility: Adult women from BPL families not having LPG connection

schemes.name: National Livelihood Mission (Aajeevika)
schemes.description: Self-employment and skilled wage employment programme for rural poor through SHGs.
schemes.benefits: SHG formation, skill training, revolving funds, bank linkage, market support
schemes.eligibility: Rural BPL households especially women

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Khel Vikas Yojana (PMKVY Sports)
schemes.description: Scheme to develop sports infrastructure and promote sports culture across India.
schemes.benefits: Khelo India centres, equipment, coaches, scholarships for young athletes
schemes.eligibility: Young athletes and sports institutions

schemes.name: National Health Protection Scheme
schemes.description: Umbrella health protection scheme for all citizens at various levels.
schemes.benefits: Health coverage, preventive care, outpatient services, cashless treatment
schemes.eligibility: All citizens

schemes.name: Make in India
schemes.description: Initiative to encourage companies to manufacture in India and boost investment and innovation.
schemes.benefits: Ease of doing business, FDI liberalization, sector-specific incentives, export promotion
schemes.eligibility: Domestic and foreign companies investing in India

schemes.name: Digital India
schemes.description: Campaign to transform India into a digitally empowered society and knowledge economy.
schemes.benefits: Digital infrastructure, government services online, digital literacy, BPO in rural areas
schemes.eligibility: All citizens and businesses

schemes.name: PM CARES Fund
schemes.description: Public charitable trust for emergency relief during disasters and public health emergencies.
schemes.benefits: Emergency relief, medical equipment, vaccine support, welfare of distressed citizens
schemes.eligibility: All citizens affected by disaster or pandemic
